projectDescription: A feature-rich Discord bot providing moderation, auto-moderation, leveling, tickets, and server configuration tools for Discord server administrators.
keyFeatures: Full moderation suite (warn, kick, ban, timeout, mute, role management)
Native Discord AutoMod integration for spam, invites, mentions, and custom keywords
Ticket system with panels, topics, transcripts, priority, and staff claiming
XP-based leveling system with customizable role rewards and leaderboards
Welcome, goodbye, and boost messages with a rich embed scripting engine
Sticky messages that stay pinned at the bottom of channels
Fake permissions system for fine-grained command access control
Message snipe, edit snipe, and reaction snipe commands
AFK status with automatic mention notifications
publicApiSurface: mute / unmute / imute / iunmute / rmute / runmute
purge (and subcommands: user, bots, humans, contains, links, invites, embeds, files, mentions, regex)
setup (and subcommands: modlog, muted, imuted, rmuted, view)
automod (and subcommands: list, antispam, antiinvites, mentions, keywords add/remove/list, exempt, disable, reset)
ticket (and subcommands: panel create/send/delete/list, topic add/remove/list, category, role, logs, limit, message, naming, settings, close, add, remove, rename, claim, unclaim, transfer, priority)
levels (and subcommands: unlock, lock, ignore, list, add, remove, roles, stackroles, message, messagemode, setrate, sync, leaderboard)
pagination (set, add, update, remove, delete, reset, list, restorereactions)
